feedback: Excellent first generation. Orange VR goggles, neck tattoo, bell earrings all match brief. Techwear armor has great orange accent lines. Face has strong Asian features. Could use skin enhancement for more realism. Background desert is good. 1.5MB image quality solid.
First generation matched character bible well. All key visual elements present.

MASSIVE improvement with multi-image style refs. Same lighting, background, color grading as confirmed characters. Pale grey studio bg, cool-neutral frontal light, desaturated tones, gold bell earrings match perfectly. Orange VR goggles and armor accents provide the warm self-illumination signature. Symmetrical frontal composition matches the sacred futurism aesthetic. This is the correct workflow: always include 3 style reference images from confirmed characters.
